title: Settings
subtitle: Your account, your preferences and the circle data.

profile.title: Account profile
profile.subtitle: Your name and photo, visible to the members of your circles.
profile.name: Display name

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language of the app interface.

theme.title: Theme
theme.subtitle: Light, dark, or automatically matched to your device.

notif.title: Push notifications
notif.subtitle: Get the circle's reminders and alerts directly on this device, even when the app is closed.
notif.unsupported: Notifications are not supported on this browser.
notif.denied: Permission denied. Allow notifications in your browser settings.

export.title: Export circle data
export.subtitle: Download all the data of the active circle (journal, health, medications, calendar, tasks, expenses, documents…) as a JSON file. Your data stays with you.

import.title: Import data
import.subtitle: Restore data from an OpenCare export file into the active circle. Imported items are added to the existing data.
